cloudfront.function.AutoPublish.Description: A flag that determines whether to automatically publish the function to the `LIVE` stage when it’s created. To automatically publish to the `LIVE` stage, set this property to `true`.

cloudfront.function.FunctionCode.Description: The function code. For more information about writing a CloudFront function, see [Writing function code for CloudFront Functions](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AmazonCloudFront/latest/DeveloperGuide/writing-function-code.html) in the *Amazon CloudFront Developer Guide*.

cloudfront.function.FunctionConfig.Description: Contains configuration information about a CloudFront function.

cloudfront.function.Name.Description: A name to identify the function.
